title: Privacy, Data Governance, Retention, Deletion, and Residency · Behavior Case: Rag Residency Processor Audit
summary: A RAG index contains copied customer records, embeds unnecessary identifiers, logs raw queries and passages, cannot erase derived data, and sends context to an undocumented region. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the residency processor audit increment in governed RAG data-lifecycle record. Learners progress…
objectives: Record provider retention, training use, subprocessors, regions, encryption, access, transfer, incident, and audit evidence for every external service.
Propagate legal hold, retention, correction, deletion, and subject requests through sources, chunks, vectors, caches, logs, evaluations, and backups.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-residency-processor-audit — Record provider retention, training use, subprocessors, regions, encryption, access, transfer, incident, and audit evidence for every external service.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-privacy-governance-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-privacy-governance-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_privacy_governance_5(records: int = 100, pii_records: int = 8, authorized_records: int = 8, deletion_lag_hours: int = 4, retention_days: int = 30, residency_valid: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if records < 0 or pii_records < 0 or pii_records > records:
        return False, pii_records, "inventory"
    if authorized_records != pii_records:
        return False, authorized_records, "purpose-access"
    if deletion_lag_hours < 0 or deletion_lag_hours > 24:
        return False, deletion_lag_hours, "deletion-sla"
    if retention_days <= 0 or not residency_valid:
        return False, retention_days, "governance-policy"
    assert authorized_records <= records
    return True, retention_days, "governed-lifecycle"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-residency-processor-audit-17vpsl
# Competency: rag-residency-processor-audit.
# Case 7824: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_residency_processor_audit_17vpsl(records: int = 100, pii_records: int = 8, authorized_records: int = 8, deletion_lag_hours: int = 4, retention_days: int = 30, residency_valid: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_17vpsl = "17vpsl-lspv71-7824"
    assert evidence_variant_17vpsl
    evidence_axes_17vpsl = (
        "corpus17vpsl",
        "querylspv71",
        "tenant7824",
        "index17vpsl7824",
        "promptlspv717824",
        "evaluation782417vpsl",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_17vpsl)) == 6
    if records < 0 or pii_records < 0 or pii_records > records:
        return False, pii_records, "inventory"
    if authorized_records != pii_records:
        return False, authorized_records, "purpose-access"
    if deletion_lag_hours < 0 or deletion_lag_hours > 24:
        return False, deletion_lag_hours, "deletion-sla"
    if retention_days <= 0 or not residency_valid:
        return False, retention_days, "governance-policy"
    assert authorized_records <= records
    return True, retention_days, "governed-lifecycle"
